text.title: Niche Positioning for Solo Dev Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: too early; mine 3+ months of data first
mine project history before lane choice; need >=3 anchors
lane still too broad; cut to single vertical or single outcome
ship decision record with named lane + headline + exit criteria

example.trace: months_in_business >= 3 AND past_projects_named >= 3 AND headline_words <= 12 → conclusion ref="exit-criteria-mandatory" verdict="ship decision record with named lane + headline + exit criteria"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
